ham.subject: Transaction Alert: Recent Activity on Your Account
ham.body:
Dear Customer,

We have noticed a transaction of ₹5,000 on your account at 10:45 AM, 15-Apr-2026. If you did not authorize this payment, please contact us immediately.

Regards,
Bank Support Team

spam.subject: Urgent: Your Crypto Wallet Suspended – Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear User,

We have detected unusual activity in your crypto wallet. To prevent potential loss of funds, your wallet has been temporarily suspended. Please confirm your identity by clicking the link below within 24 hours to restore access.

<URL>

Thank you,
CryptoSafe Security
